description: Alice makes three calendar changes: create a Tuesday stakeholder briefing, move the Thursday project review from 1 PM to 2 PM, and cancel the Monday morning standup.

events.title: Stakeholder Briefing
events.reasoning: Alice creates a new stakeholder briefing on Tuesday at 11 AM in the boardroom with Bob and Carol.
events.assumptions: Assumed 1-hour duration as no end time specified.

events.title: Project Review
events.reasoning: Alice moves the Thursday project review from 1 PM to 2 PM. Duration preserved. Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Duration preserved as 1 hour from the original event.

events.title: Morning Standup
events.reasoning: Alice cancels the Monday morning standup as the team switches to async updates. Matches calendar event [2].

mock_llm_response.summary: Three changes: created stakeholder briefing Tuesday 11 AM, moved project review to Thursday 2 PM, cancelled Monday standup.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). Tuesday = 2026-02-24, Thursday = 2026-02-26, Monday = 2026-02-23. Project Review is calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1. Morning Standup is calendar_context[1] so existing_event_id=2.
